title: Canopy Growth Analyst Ratings and Price Targets | Benzinga
text: Benzinga tracks analyst ratings and price targets for CGC. Consensus rating shows Moderate Buy from multiple analysts. Price targets tracked from major brokerage firms. ATB Capital Markets: Underperform rating with CAD $4 target. Morningstar: Buy rating with CAD $10 target. STA Research: Speculative Buy with CAD $6 target. Rating changes monitored to track analyst sentiment. Price target revisions reflected real-time market developments. Analyst commentary on company fundamentals and strategic direction. Historical rating accuracy metrics. Institutional ownership data correlated with analyst recommendations.
